caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap with a white logo, a black t-shirt featuring the text "CHECK IT OUT", and a gold chain necklace is seated in a podcast studio. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a white banner displays the word "HUSTLE" multiple times alongside yellow stars. To his right, a screen or wall features the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". The man is captured in a side profile, looking toward the left of the frame with a steady, serious expression. Throughout the sequence, his posture and position remain virtually identical, with only slight, subtle movements in his facial expression and gaze as he listens or prepares to speak.
